hook: I had the wrong pillow for a decade and didn't know it.

scenes.visual_prompt: person waking up rubbing stiff neck, frustrated
scenes.voiceover: I had the wrong pillow for a decade.

scenes.visual_prompt: stack of two pillows on bed, towel rolled up next to it
scenes.voiceover: Stacked two pillows. Rolled towels under my neck.

scenes.visual_prompt: memory foam pillow with sweat stain
scenes.voiceover: Memory foam turned my head into a sweat puddle.

scenes.visual_prompt: Eli & Elm pillow with U-shape cutout for shoulder, cooling cover
scenes.voiceover: Then I tried a U-shape side sleeper pillow.

scenes.visual_prompt: person sleeping peacefully on side, pillow contouring perfectly
scenes.voiceover: Slept through the first night. Crick is gone.

scenes.visual_prompt: second pillow being unboxed, partner had stolen the first
scenes.voiceover: Comment PILLOW and I'll DM you the link.

caption:
I had the wrong pillow for a decade and didn't know it.

Woke up stiff every morning. Tried stacking two pillows. Tried rolling a towel under my neck. Switched sides. Bought a memory foam block that turned my head into a sweat puddle.

Then I tried the Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow — U-shape cutout for your shoulder, latex-and-fiber blend you can adjust, and a cooling cover that actually stays cool.

First night I slept through. The morning crick is gone. My partner stole it the second night and I had to order another one.

Comment PILLOW and I'll DM you the link.
Affiliate link — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #sleepbetter #sidesleeper #bedroomupgrade
